name: Feature request
about: Propose a new capability or behavior change
labels: enhancement

## Problem

<!-- What are you trying to do that Augur makes hard or impossible today? Concrete use case beats abstract wishlist. -->

## Proposal

<!-- What change to the SDK or HTTP server would solve it? Be specific about the public API surface if you have one in mind. -->

## Alternatives considered

<!-- Other ways to solve the same problem, and why they're worse. -->

## Out of scope

<!-- What this proposal explicitly does *not* try to solve, to keep the discussion focused. -->
